scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --prefix "[{name}]" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf backend/dist frontend/dist backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules node_modules
